_meta.poc_note: Tier 1 (lineup) is awareness-only: the six Ford trucks and vans in the prototype carousel, name + character, no config tree. Tier 2 (models) carries the full configurable tree and exists ONLY for the F-150 Lariat in this POC.
_meta.verified: Colour / wheel / interior option lists sourced from the Ford F-150 Lariat build & price configurator (2026 model year). Confirm against official Ford data before production.
_meta.miles3_pricing: lineup[].price = nameplate STARTING MSRP (2026, ford.com, price_verified:true) — used for persona/budget narrowing. It is the entry price to the nameplate, NOT the buildable trim base (the F-150 Lariat build base lives in models.f-150-lariat.trims[].starting_price_usd = 62995). Option price fields are DELTAS from the trim base; those marked price_verified:false are directional placeholders — verify against the ford.com configurator before production.
_meta.miles3_personaTags: lineup[].personaTags scores {build,thrill,adventure} per vehicle (0-3), tunable defaults for app/persona.py recommendation. Thrill has no native performance vehicle yet (see docs/AUDIT.md).

lineup.name: Ford Maverick
lineup.character: The right-sized truck — city-friendly, thrifty, endlessly handy for the weekend.

lineup.name: Ford Ranger
lineup.character: The adventurer's mid-size — nimble on the trail, tough enough for real work.

lineup.name: Ford F-150
lineup.character: America's truck — the all-rounder that hauls, tows, and does it in comfort.

lineup.name: Ford Super Duty
lineup.character: The heavy hitter — built for the biggest trailers and the hardest jobs.

lineup.name: Ford E-Transit
lineup.character: The all-electric workhorse — quiet, clean, and ready for the daily route.

lineup.name: Ford Transit
lineup.character: The cavernous do-anything van — the mobile workshop that swallows it all.

features.label: Available 4x4 with electronic-locking rear axle
features.benefit: Sure-footed on gravel, snow and the job site — confidence wherever the work leads.

features.label: SYNC 4 with 12-inch touchscreen
features.benefit: Maps, media and voice control, right where you glance.

features.label: Pro Power Onboard generator
features.benefit: Run power tools, tailgate gear or a campsite straight from the truck.

features.label: Bang & Olufsen sound system
features.benefit: Studio-grade audio that makes the long haul fly by.

features.label: Ford Co-Pilot360 driver assistance
features.benefit: Confident lane-keeping, blind-spot coverage and pre-collision braking.

features.label: Best-in-class towing and payload capability
features.benefit: Haul the trailer, the boat or a weekend's worth of gear with room to spare.

exterior_colors.name: Agate Black Metallic
exterior_colors.note: A deep, glossy black with a fine metallic sparkle.

exterior_colors.name: Iconic Silver Metallic
exterior_colors.note: A bright, modern silver that shrugs off the dust.

exterior_colors.name: Carbonized Gray Metallic
exterior_colors.note: A dark, technical grey with a rugged edge.

exterior_colors.name: Avalanche
exterior_colors.note: A cool, light stone-grey — understated and tough.

exterior_colors.name: Marsh Gray
exterior_colors.note: A warm, muted earth-grey made for the trail.

exterior_colors.name: Antimatter Blue Metallic
exterior_colors.note: A deep, confident blue with real depth.

exterior_colors.name: Argon Blue Metallic
exterior_colors.note: A brighter, energetic blue with a sporting edge.

exterior_colors.name: Ruby Red Metallic Tinted Clearcoat
exterior_colors.note: A rich, jewel-like red under a tinted clearcoat.

exterior_colors.name: Star White Metallic Tri-Coat
exterior_colors.note: A luminous pearl white with a soft, premium shimmer.

wheels.note: Clean, durable everyday face — comfort-leaning ride.
Bright PVD chrome — a polished, premium look.
Larger 20s in gloss black — bold and planted.
The biggest, boldest look — dark and assertive.

interiors.note: Hard-wearing ActiveX seating in a warm slate grey — easy-going and refined.
Classic black ActiveX — clean, low-maintenance and timeless.
A rich brown ActiveX with an upscale, lived-in warmth.
